name: whisper-cpp
description: Port of OpenAI's Whisper model in C/C++

cuda.description: Enable CUDA support for GPU acceleration

metal.description: Enable Metal support for GPU acceleration on macOS

vulkan.description: Enable Vulkan support for GPU acceleration

avx512.description: Enable AVX-512 instruction set support (includes VBMI and VNNI)

rename-whisper-basic.description: Rename the output library to whisper-basic (for whisper-cpp-basic variant)

rename-whisper-vulkan.description: Rename the output library to whisper-vulkan (for whisper-cpp-vulkan variant)
